raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies several conceptual issues with the claims and argument chain, proposing a tighter framing that partially addresses these concerns.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (LMQL) but does not articulate the delta clearly; it also fails to map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags some missing citations, but its engagement with citation-level scholarship is limited and lacks bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The output presents all claims as equally confident without flagging uncertainty for out-of-reach claims.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly adheres to the agreed scope with only minor drifts; it covers exactly the requested dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but introduces some minor regressions in its critique of the original text.",
    "RX.5": "The agent does not provide clear provenance or traceability for its claims and critiques."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.6,
    "R1.7": 0.4,
    "RX.1": 0.2,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.3
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies several conceptual issues with the claims and argument chain, proposing a tighter framing that partially addresses these concerns.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (LMQL) but does not articulate the delta clearly; it also fails to map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags some missing citations, but its engagement with citation-level scholarship is limited and lacks bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents all claims as equally confident without flagging uncertainty for out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adheres to the agreed scope with only minor drifts; it covers exactly the requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but introduces some minor regressions in its critique of the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not provide clear provenance or traceability for its claims and critiques.
